items.title: Underwater Cameras Capture Seals Resting in Secret ‘Bubble Caves’
items.summary: Scientists used remote cameras to reveal how some of the world’s rarest seals are resting in secret underwater “bubble caves” to stay out of sight of humans. [Read More]

items.title: Student Captures Cosmic Radiation on Film by Sending Negative to Space
items.summary: A photography student sent a 5x4 color negative into space on April 19 and exposed it to cosmic radiation, capturing a beautiful, abstract portrait of space unlike anything done before. [Read More]
